title: Give My Regards to Broadway
writer: Samuel Hoffenstein, John Klempner, Elizabeth Reinhardt
actors: Dan Dailey, Charles Winninger, Nancy Guild
plot: The Norwick family has had a successful run on the vaudeville circuit, but now some of the family want out. Mom is ready to retire on the family's farm, and daughter June wants to quit now that she's engaged. That only leaves Dad ...
